User interface components and utilities for Pebble firmware, including dialogs, animations, layers, and window management.

## Folders
- **[dialogs](dialogs/README.md)**: Dialog interfaces and structures for Pebble firmware, including actionable, Bluetooth, confirmation, expandable, and simple dialogs.
- **[kino](kino/README.md)**: Kino animations and UI layer management with KinoLayer, KinoPlayer, and KinoReel structures and functions.
- **[recognizer](recognizer/README.md)**: Touch event recognizer system with state management, event handling, and gesture recognition for Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[action_bar_layer.c](action_bar_layer.c.md)**: Implements the ActionBarLayer UI component for Pebble firmware, including animations and icon management.
- **[action_bar_layer.h](action_bar_layer.h.md)**: Defines the ActionBarLayer UI component for Pebble, allowing configuration of icons, click handlers, and animations.
- **[action_button.c](action_button.c.md)**: Draws and updates an action button on a Pebble smartwatch interface using specified graphics contexts.
- **[action_button.h](action_button.h.md)**: Functions for drawing and updating an action button on a UI layer in Pebble firmware.
- **[action_menu_hierarchy.c](action_menu_hierarchy.c.md)**: Implements functions for creating and managing action menu hierarchies in the Pebble firmware.
- **[action_menu_hierarchy.h](action_menu_hierarchy.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing action menu hierarchies in a user interface.
- **[action_menu_layer.c](action_menu_layer.c.md)**: Implementation of an action menu layer for Pebble firmware, including item selection and animation features.
- **[action_menu_layer.h](action_menu_layer.h.md)**: Defines the ActionMenuLayer structure and functions for creating and managing action menus.
- **[action_menu_window.c](action_menu_window.c.md)**: Implements an action menu window for the Pebble firmware, including animations and user interactions.
- **[action_menu_window.h](action_menu_window.h.md)**: Defines the ActionMenu UI component, including configuration, callbacks, and functions for managing its lifecycle.
- **[action_menu_window_private.h](action_menu_window_private.h.md)**: Defines data structures and types for managing action menus, including levels, items, and animations.
- **[action_toggle.c](action_toggle.c.md)**: Implements dialog management for toggling actions with prompt and result handling in Pebble firmware.
- **[action_toggle.h](action_toggle.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing action toggle dialogs with state and prompt configurations.
- **[animation.c](animation.c.md)**: Implements animation management for Pebble firmware, including scheduling, updating, and handling animation states.
- **[animation.h](animation.h.md)**: Framework for creating and managing animations in Pebble apps, including custom animations and handlers.
- **[animation_interpolate.c](animation_interpolate.c.md)**: Functions for linear and custom interpolation of various data types, including support for "moook" animations.
- **[animation_interpolate.h](animation_interpolate.h.md)**: Routines for interpolating between values and points, including various interpolation functions and Moook curve configurations.
- **[animation_private.h](animation_private.h.md)**: Defines private data structures and functions for managing animations in the Pebble firmware.
- **[animation_timing.c](animation_timing.c.md)**: Implements animation timing functions with easing curves and interpolation for Pebble firmware.
- **[animation_timing.h](animation_timing.h.md)**: Functions for converting normalized time to various animation timings using segments, curves, and tables.

- **[app_window_stack.h](app_window_stack.h.md)**: Functions for managing a stack of windows in Pebble OS, including push, pop, and remove operations.
